prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CHSAW-SHARPENBURR-316-IR-TT Product Type: KNIFE_SHARPENER Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Chainsaw Sharpener Burr Sanding File Hardware Tool 120 Grit Description: The ToolTreaux sharpening burr was designed to be used with chainsaw blades and can be applied instead of a standard blade to keep your chainsaw blade as sharp as possible. By using a sharpener burr regularly, you can ensure a long-lasting service life for your chainsaw.

In addition to keeping your chainsaw blades sharp, sharpening burrs grinding stones are great for a bunch of different hobby crafts and woodworking projects. You can use them for polishing jade, wood, blades, molds, and steel. These particular burrs are ideal for polishing metal after heat treatment.

Our chainsaw sharpening burr is made of durable, high-quality steel that won't rust and will last longer than a traditional sharpener burr. You can count on it for a myriad of hardware projects, hobbies, crafts, and professional applications.

This sanding burr has a 120 grit rating which is ideal for fine abrasive applications. These higher-rated grits create smoother surface finishes than coarser abrasives that scrape off materials quickly. The burr comes with a convenient plastic storage tube to keep it safe and secure when not in use. Search Terms: burr grinder chainsaw sharpener mini chainsaw blades sharpener sharpening burr sander tool hand sander sanding disc blades machines metal polish fine grit hardware grinding wheel grinder polishing pad silver polishing wheel woodworking tools Features: - CHAINSAW SANDING BURR - ToolTreaux sharpening burr is designed for use with chainsaw blades and can be applied instead of a standard blade to keep the chain blade sharp. Ensure long-lasting blade life for your chainsaw blades! - VERSATILE SHARPENING TOOL - Sharpening burr grinding stone files are great for a myriad of hobby crafts and woodworking. Use them for polishing blades, jade, wood, molds, and steel. Ideal for polishing metal, especially steel parts after heat treatment - STURDY CONSTRUCTION - Chainsaw burr is made from high-quality, durable steel that will last longer than a traditional sharpener. Count on it for hardware projects, crafts, hobbies and professional applications - FINE GRIT - ToolTreaux sanding burr is rated as 120 grit, ideal for fine abrasive applications. These grits will create smoother surface finishes, rather than coarser abrasives that scrape off materials quickly. Comes with a clear plastic storage tube. - SPECIFICATIONS - Grinding length: 1.75"; Head diameter: 3/18"; Shank size: 1/8"; Grit size: 120 (fine abrasive); Colors: chrome, clear, blue; Materials: steel, plastic; Storage case included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Chainsaw Sharpener Burr 120 Grit Sanding File

openai.title_differentiation: Fits Chainsaw Blades, Durable Steel, Storage Tube, Wood, Jade And Metal Polishing, Fine Abrasive Finish
